name: archpillar-localization
description: Compile-time-extracted UI translation for .NET. Each string is written once at the call site as an in-code ICU MessageFormat default (also the runtime fallback, so the app works with zero translation files); a Roslyn generator extracts them for translators, and per-language catalogs load at runtime as overrides — an alternative to .resx / IStringLocalizer with no "missing resource" state and culture-correct plurals.
